projects.title: Oh Deer!: An Ethological Study on Local Deer Populations
projects.description: A research project for my Animal Behaviour class that was looking at local deer populations feeding habits outside Okotoks, AB and a wild population near Longview, AB.

projects.title: Alberta Invasive Species Council
projects.description: Wrote a report for the Alberta Invasive Species Council on the potentially invasive Siberian Squill that could threaten the Western Blue Flag Iris.

projects.title: Saddle Lake Solar Farm
projects.description: A project on a theoretical solar farm at the Saddle Lake reserve in Northern Alberta that included basic ArcGIS tools, vector and rasters, DEMs, and the whole ArcGIS pro workflow.

projects.title: Freshwater Conservation Canada Poster
projects.description: Worked on a project for Freshwater Conservation Canada at Elk Creek and quantified their efforts. This poster is the simplified version focusing on the accessability and readability for anyone to read.

projects.title: 2026 Winter Olympics Poster
projects.description: A data visualization poster created for the 2026 Milan-Cortina Winter Olympics.

projects.title: Robot Car
projects.description: Created a robotic car about 5 years ago that stops x amount of cm away from a light. The official image is lost along with the robot.

projects.title: Freshwater Conservation Canada Analysis
projects.description: Designed an interactive Power BI dashboard summarising multi-year ecological monitoring data, allowing stakeholders to filter by species, year, and survey location.
